channel.title: Oregon - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

image.title: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In the heat of the summer, there’s nothing like a cold beer! Even better, there’s nothing like a cold American craft beer!! This week on Beer America TV we’re talking about BridgePort Brewing’s Summer Squeeze . Brewed with Lemon grass and Yuzu, this “Bright Ale” is clean, crisp and leaves you with a bit of […]

The post BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Full Sail Brewing: LTD 04, Ep. 158
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Most of the time here on Beer America TV we discuss beers full of malt, tons of hops or a combination of both, this week, we discuss a beer thats basic, but still full of flavor . Full Sail LTD 04 is a beer brewed with only a single malt and a single hop, and […]

The post Full Sail Brewing: LTD 04, Ep. 158 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Deschutes Brewery: Black Butte Porter, Ep. 156
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
It’s the beginning of 2012, so we here at Beer America TV decided to talk about an excellent Porter to help warm you in the crisp air. Deschutes Black Butte Porter is their flagship brand with an extrememly sessionable ABV of 5.2% . Malty goodness with a slight hop bitterness makes this multi-award winning beer […]

The post Deschutes Brewery: Black Butte Porter, Ep. 156 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Deschutes Brewery: Mirror Pond Pale Ale – Ep. 130
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
At Beer America TV we’ve reviewed many beers from many American breweries, but I have to be honest, it surprised us when we realized that we had yet to review a beer from Deschutes. Well , the wait is over! We start with their most popular offering, Mirror Pond Pale Ale . You would think […]

The post Deschutes Brewery: Mirror Pond Pale Ale – Ep. 130 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rogue Brewery – Santa’s Private Reserve Ale, Ep. 121
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
At Christmas time even Santa appears to need a little holiday cheer in the form of a quality American craft beer, so leave it up to the folks at Rogue to whip us a batch of Santa’s Private Reserve Ale! It’s actually a double red with a really nice malty back bone and a nice […]

The post Rogue Brewery – Santa’s Private Reserve Ale, Ep. 121 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 25 – Widmer Brothers Brrr
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Brewed for the season, Widmer Brothers Brewing in Portland Oregon checks in with their winter seasonal, Brrr . This brew will warm you up to the holidays, and as a bonus, goes great with your holiday meal!

The post Episode 25 – Widmer Brothers Brrr first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
